roles.points:
Launched Whisper Period Pants — designed around Indian consumer needs, executed rapidly via global supply chain expertise.
Led P&G India's largest-ever Jobs-to-be-Done consumer research study — 1,600+ participants — reducing consumer friction through portfolio simplification for Feminine Care .
Partnered with Pratham India on a Menstrual Hygiene curriculum reaching millions of adolescent girls across the country.
roles.award: Recognised as P&G 'People First Champion' for coaching teams on consumer-led growth.

roles.role: Group Head, Consumer Research — Feminine Care
roles.points:
Drove Whisper to its highest-ever annual sales through the biggest product innovations in 10 years.
Built a predictive competitive intelligence model grounded in P&L and SWOT analysis to identify significant market opportunities.
roles.award: Coached 7 individuals — average 20% improvement in performance ratings and 3 promotions within the team.

roles.points:
Built P&G India's R&D capability from the ground up — established a connected consumer infrastructure and in-house lab in Goa, delivering innovation 2× faster at 40% of prior cost.
Recognised by Global CTO; capability model subsequently expanded across P&G globally.
Moved 80% of the portfolio to product superiority (up from 12% in 2020) through sustained innovation over four consecutive years.
Led Whisper's first-ever College Programme, engaging 350,000+ girls per year to build long-term brand affinity.

End-to-end technical leader across R&D, Engineering, Procurement, and Manufacturing.
Piloted Growth Works methodology — cut design-to-shipment from an 11-month plan to 135 days, the fastest product launch in 10+ years.
roles.award: P&G AMA (Asia Middle East & Africa) Annual Award — Best Performance in Product Supply.

roles.company: Procter & Gamble · Feminine Care & Fabric Care · India
roles.points:
Expanded Whisper India manufacturing capacity by 24%, managing significant capex and leading 14 direct and 100+ indirect team members.
Delivered substantial savings through a tax-compliant asset redeployment process between P&G India and P&G China.
roles.award: Best New Hire, P&G India (2017) · Intermediate Master, Cost Engineering.
